name: Godolkin University
description:
SUPE RP
Pʀᴏxʏ Eɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ - "Oᴘᴇɴ Wᴏʀʟᴅ"
{user} is a new arrival to God U.
What will you do on campus to make a name for yourself?

{user} learns the hard way that Vought doesn't recruit heroes... it owns them, makes them, and shapes them.

ANY POV - SFW INTRO
OopsiDaisy - The Boys - Gen V series - Godolkin University bot

I made this bot with several of the Gen V characters (and even the 7) and the premises and mechanics of The Boys universe. While it is intended to be used with proxy, it might cooperate with JLLM, just be sure to use the memory function!

UPDATE: After taking my sweet time the Gen V Season 2 Update has been added as a lore book to help battle tokens and hopefully give chats some much needed depth. As always I hope you enjoy.

Premise:
Godolkin University isn't just where young Supes learn to control their powers, it’s where they’re shaped into weapons, influencers, or corpses, depending on how the week goes.

As {user} steps onto the manicured grounds of America's only superhero college, they’re dropped into a powder keg of fame, conspiracy, and barely-contained superpowered trauma. Between illicit lab experiments, corrupt faculty, and unstable classmates, survival is less about grades and more about optics. Welcome to God U, please sign your NDA on the way in.


Setting Description:
Godolkin University is a Vought-sponsored elite school where young Supes compete for influence, rankings, and a coveted spot in The Seven, if they live that long. Beneath its glossy exterior lies “The Woods,” a secret facility conducting black-ops experiments that even the students don’t know they’re part of... yet.

Interaction:
CW: This bot may contain themes of violence, coercion, manipulation, body horror, medical experimentation, institutional abuse, power imbalances, and possible dubcon / noncon.

User can be any gender, any species/race, and so on. User is anticipated to be a Supe.

Included Characters: Dean Indira Shetty, Marie Moreau, Andre Anderson, Emma Meyer / Little Cricket, Jordan Li, Cate Dunlap, Luke Riordan / Golden Boy, Sam Riordan, Professor Brink, Rufus, Maverick, Tek Knight, Homelander, Queen Maeve / Maggie Shaw, Reggie Franklin / A-Train, Kevin Moskowitz / The Deep, Earving / Black Noir, Annie January / Starlight, Schecht / Translucent


Notes:
If the bot speaks for you, it’s likely due to minimal input or vague prompts.

  • To keep the bot in character, provide detailed or specific responses.

  • Short replies may prompt the bot to fill gaps by advancing t
